subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath revealed in the dense gloom of vain imaginings the Sun of true knowledge, and through it hath guided those who had wandered in the wilderness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر فی دیجور الاوهام شمس العرفان و هدی بها الذین تا هوا فی قلوات
